# CMake build for vendored libffi (static library only).
# Supports: x86_64 (macOS/Linux), aarch64 (macOS/Linux), x86_64 Windows.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

if(MSVC)
    project(ffi C ASM_MASM)
else()
    project(ffi C ASM)
endif()

set(FFI_SRC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
set(FFI_INC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include)

# ── Detect architecture and platform ────────────────────────────────
if(CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR MATCHES "x86_64|AMD64|amd64")
    set(FFI_ARCH "x86_64")
elseif(CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR MATCHES "aarch64|arm64|ARM64")
    set(FFI_ARCH "aarch64")
else()
    message(FATAL_ERROR "libffi: unsupported architecture: ${CMAKE_SYSTEM_PROCESSOR}")
endif()

# ── Platform-specific source files ──────────────────────────────────
set(FFI_GEN_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated)
file(MAKE_DIRECTORY ${FFI_GEN_DIR})

set(FFI_CORE_SOURCES
    ${FFI_SRC}/prep_cif.c
    ${FFI_SRC}/types.c
    ${FFI_SRC}/raw_api.c
    ${FFI_SRC}/java_raw_api.c
    ${FFI_SRC}/closures.c
    ${FFI_SRC}/tramp.c
)

if(FFI_ARCH STREQUAL "x86_64")
    if(WIN32 AND MSVC)
        # MSVC: preprocess win64_intel.S with cl /EP, then assemble with ml64.
        set(FFI_ASM_INPUT ${FFI_SRC}/x86/win64_intel.S)
        set(FFI_ASM_OUTPUT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/win64_intel.asm)
        add_custom_command(
            OUTPUT ${FFI_ASM_OUTPUT}
            COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND}
                -DCC=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
                -DINPUT=${FFI_ASM_INPUT}
                -DOUTPUT=${FFI_ASM_OUTPUT}
                "-DINCLUDES=/I${FFI_GEN_DIR} /I${FFI_INC} /I${FFI_SRC}/x86"
                "-DDEFINES=/DLIBFFI_ASM /DX86_WIN64 /DFFI_STATIC_BUILD /DFFI_BUILDING"
                -P ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/preprocess_asm.cmake
            DEPENDS ${FFI_ASM_INPUT}
                    ${FFI_INC}/ffi_cfi.h
                    ${FFI_SRC}/x86/asmnames.h
            COMMENT "Preprocessing win64_intel.S -> win64_intel.asm"
            VERBATIM
        )
        set(FFI_ARCH_SOURCES
            ${FFI_SRC}/x86/ffiw64.c
            ${FFI_ASM_OUTPUT}
        )
        set(FFI_TARGET "X86_WIN64")
    elseif(WIN32)
        set(FFI_ARCH_SOURCES
            ${FFI_SRC}/x86/ffiw64.c
            ${FFI_SRC}/x86/win64.S
        )
        set(FFI_TARGET "X86_WIN64")
    else()
        set(FFI_ARCH_SOURCES
            ${FFI_SRC}/x86/ffi64.c
            ${FFI_SRC}/x86/unix64.S
            ${FFI_SRC}/x86/ffiw64.c
            ${FFI_SRC}/x86/win64.S
        )
        set(FFI_TARGET "X86_64")
    endif()
    set(FFI_TARGET_DIR "x86")
elseif(FFI_ARCH STREQUAL "aarch64")
    if(WIN32)
        set(FFI_TARGET "ARM_WIN64")
    else()
        set(FFI_TARGET "AARCH64")
    endif()
    set(FFI_ARCH_SOURCES
        ${FFI_SRC}/aarch64/ffi.c
        ${FFI_SRC}/aarch64/sysv.S
    )
    set(FFI_TARGET_DIR "aarch64")
endif()

# ── Generate ffi.h from ffi.h.in ───────────────────────────────────
set(VERSION "3.4.7")
set(TARGET ${FFI_TARGET})

# long double: differs by platform
if(APPLE AND FFI_ARCH STREQUAL "aarch64")
    set(HAVE_LONG_DOUBLE 0)
else()
    set(HAVE_LONG_DOUBLE 1)
endif()

set(FFI_EXEC_TRAMPOLINE_TABLE 0)

file(READ ${FFI_INC}/ffi.h.in FFI_H_CONTENT)
string(REPLACE "@VERSION@" "${VERSION}" FFI_H_CONTENT "${FFI_H_CONTENT}")
string(REPLACE "@TARGET@" "${TARGET}" FFI_H_CONTENT "${FFI_H_CONTENT}")
string(REPLACE "@HAVE_LONG_DOUBLE@" "${HAVE_LONG_DOUBLE}" FFI_H_CONTENT "${FFI_H_CONTENT}")
string(REPLACE "@FFI_EXEC_TRAMPOLINE_TABLE@" "${FFI_EXEC_TRAMPOLINE_TABLE}" FFI_H_CONTENT "${FFI_H_CONTENT}")
file(WRITE ${FFI_GEN_DIR}/ffi.h "${FFI_H_CONTENT}")

# Copy ffitarget.h for the target architecture
file(COPY ${FFI_SRC}/${FFI_TARGET_DIR}/ffitarget.h DESTINATION ${FFI_GEN_DIR})

# ── Generate fficonfig.h ────────────────────────────────────────────
set(FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "/* Generated by CMake for libffi ${VERSION} */\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define PACKAGE \"libffi\"\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define PACKAGE_VERSION \"${VERSION}\"\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define VERSION \"${VERSION}\"\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define SIZEOF_DOUBLE 8\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define SIZEOF_SIZE_T ${CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P}\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_MEMCPY 1\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_STDINT_H 1\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_INTTYPES_H 1\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define STDC_HEADERS 1\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_ALLOCA 1\n")

if(HAVE_LONG_DOUBLE)
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_LONG_DOUBLE 1\n")
    if(FFI_ARCH STREQUAL "x86_64")
        string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define SIZEOF_LONG_DOUBLE 16\n")
    else()
        string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define SIZEOF_LONG_DOUBLE 8\n")
    endif()
else()
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define SIZEOF_LONG_DOUBLE 8\n")
endif()

if(NOT WIN32)
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_DLFCN_H 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_MMAP 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_MMAP_ANON 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_MMAP_DEV_ZERO 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_MMAP_FILE 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_MKOSTEMP 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_SYS_MMAN_H 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_UNISTD_H 1\n")
endif()

if(APPLE)
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define SYMBOL_UNDERSCORE 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define FFI_MMAP_EXEC_WRIT 1\n")
elseif(UNIX)
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define EH_FRAME_FLAGS \"a\"\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_AS_CFI_PSEUDO_OP 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_RO_EH_FRAME 1\n")
    string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_HIDDEN_VISIBILITY_ATTRIBUTE 1\n")
    if(FFI_ARCH STREQUAL "x86_64")
        string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_AS_X86_PCREL 1\n")
        string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define HAVE_AS_X86_64_UNWIND_SECTION_TYPE 1\n")
    endif()
endif()

# Hidden visibility helper for both C and ASM
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#ifdef HAVE_HIDDEN_VISIBILITY_ATTRIBUTE\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#ifdef LIBFFI_ASM\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#ifdef __APPLE__\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define FFI_HIDDEN(name) .private_extern name\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#else\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define FFI_HIDDEN(name) .hidden name\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#endif\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#else\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define FFI_HIDDEN __attribute__ ((visibility (\"hidden\")))\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#endif\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#else\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#ifdef LIBFFI_ASM\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define FFI_HIDDEN(name)\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#else\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#define FFI_HIDDEN\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#endif\n")
string(APPEND FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT "#endif\n")

file(WRITE ${FFI_GEN_DIR}/fficonfig.h "${FFI_CONFIG_CONTENT}")

# ── Build static library ───────────────────────────────────────────
add_library(ffi_static STATIC ${FFI_CORE_SOURCES} ${FFI_ARCH_SOURCES})

target_include_directories(ffi_static
    PUBLIC  ${FFI_GEN_DIR}
    PRIVATE ${FFI_GEN_DIR} ${FFI_INC} ${FFI_SRC}/${FFI_TARGET_DIR}
)

# Assembly files need the same include paths
set_target_properties(ffi_static PROPERTIES
    POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON
    C_STANDARD 99
)

# Suppress warnings in vendored code
if(MSVC)
    target_compile_options(ffi_static PRIVATE /w)
else()
    target_compile_options(ffi_static PRIVATE -w)
endif()

# When building as a static library, tell ffi.h not to use dllimport (MSVC).
target_compile_definitions(ffi_static PUBLIC FFI_STATIC_BUILD FFI_BUILDING)

# Alias for clean consumption
add_library(ffi::ffi ALIAS ffi_static)
